name: Local AI
description: LocalAI provider for self-hosted, OpenAI-compatible local model inference.

CACHE_DIR.label: Dir
CACHE_DIR.help: Filesystem path to the cache directory for model assets.

MODELS_DIR.label: Dir
MODELS_DIR.help: Filesystem path to the directory where AI models are stored.

LOCAL_LARGE_MODEL.label: Large Model
LOCAL_LARGE_MODEL.help: Filename of the large local AI model.

LOCAL_SMALL_MODEL.label: Small Model
LOCAL_SMALL_MODEL.help: Filename of the small local AI model.

CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES.label: Visible Devices
CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES.help: Used to detect if CUDA-enabled GPUs are available.

LOCAL_EMBEDDING_MODEL.label: Embedding Model
LOCAL_EMBEDDING_MODEL.help: Filename of the embedding model used for vector embeddings.

LOCAL_EMBEDDING_DIMENSIONS.label: Embedding Dimensions
LOCAL_EMBEDDING_DIMENSIONS.help: Number of dimensions the embedding model outputs.
